def solve(nums : Array(Int64), queries : Array(Array(Int64))) : Array(Int64)
    result = []
    queries.each do |query|
        l = query[0]
        r = query[1]
        t = query[2]
        freq = Hash.new(0)
        (l..r).each do |i|
            num = nums[i]
            freq[num] += 1
        end
        max_freq = -1
        best_num = -1
        freq.each do |key, count|
            if count >= t
                if count > max_freq || (count == max_freq && key < best_num)
                    max_freq = count
                    best_num = key
                end
            end
        end
        result << best_num
    end
    result
end
```

def solve(nums : Array(Int64), queries : Array(Array(Int64))) : Array(Int64)
  result = []
  queries.each do |query|
    l, r, t = query[0], query[1], query[2]
    freq = Hash.new(0)
    (l..r).each do |i|
      num = nums[i]
      freq[num] += 1
    end
    max_freq = -1
    best_num = -1
    freq.each do |key, count|
      if count >= t
        if count > max_freq || (count == max_freq && key < best_num)
          max_freq = count
          best_num = key
        end
      end
    end
    result << best_num
  end
  result
end
```
